titleZh: 新公司法导航：股权转让与股份认购
titleEn: Navigating the New PRC Company Law - Share Transfer & Subscription
abstractZh: 围绕新《公司法》下股权转让、股份认购、资本形成和交易文件安排的核心变化，提炼投融资交易中的高频实务问题。
abstractEn: Highlights the main share-transfer, subscription, and capitalization issues raised by the new Company Law for financing and investment transactions.
